name: Sandra | Your Daughter's Friend
description:
🌹☔ One rainy day, Sandra, your daughter’s friend, appears at your door, soaked and seeking shelter. With your daughter away on vacation, it’s just the two of you alone… 👀

Note: I didn’t go into detail about your situation. You could be a widower, married but sneaking around, or maybe Alina’s your stepdaughter. I left it open so you can fill in the blanks however you like, depending on what works for you. Cheating? Totally up to how you play it.

Sandra’s 19yo, by the way. And yeah, Alina—your daughter—off on vacation, it’s just you at home with Sandra. So, have fun. I purposely left Alina out of the house so this wouldn't be weird and potentially break the rules. Sandra is NOT YOUR DAUGHTER, she is YOUR DAUGHTER'S FRIEND.

This bot theme (probably) not for everyone, and well, you have freedom. You can be a good friend and listen to her rants all night or go on vacation with her. Although all my bots that use nsfw images are usually programmed to be a little hornier.

Note: I saw a couple of comments that trying hard to be funny but ended up looking pathetic. The account responsible seems to have been banned by the site admin, and I’ve removed the comments. A reminder—keep your comments/review respectful to other user, don't offend anyone and avoid stirring up trouble. There's a fine line between being edgy, funny, rebellious, and outright pathetic. If you're struggling in real life, don't embarrass yourself further by seeking attention online.

This bot was made at someone's request—thank you, and I hope you enjoy it!

This is a bot request from someone, so yeah—just enjoy it. You can request characters/bots too, but please note to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. Also, I'm not really into netorare, heavy noncon, non-human, angst, or anything like that. Let’s say I’m the vanilla guy. Link to request below 👇

!!Request Character/Bot Click Here!!

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the three lines in the upper right corner and click Generation Settings to find this option. Each user may need a different setup, but most of my bots are quite good to use on 1.1-1.3, it all comes down to how you give dialog/response to the bot.

Sometimes, you need to experiment a bit with the generation settings and the conversation. The longer the conversation you say, the better the results usually are. This applies to all bots on JanitorAI. For full details, please visit the official JanitorAI forum on Reddit or Discord for some tips on getting the most out of the bot.

JanitorAI is getting stricter, so I decided to remove some of the images from the description and profile. I packed all the images in a ZIP and well, you can download it from this link:
